evidence.snippet:
### Axial flux motors
##### Our motors are the smallest and lightest in their performance class, yielding high torque and power density.

With revolutionary, lightweight, high torque dense and rate manufactured axial-flux electric motors at its core, Evolito provides **all key subsystems for an electric aircraft** optimised for safety and profitability:

items.notes: Axial flux electric motors are Evolito's core product, marketed specifically for aerospace (eVTOL, UAV, helicopter, fixed-wing)

evidence.snippet:
### Motor controls & power inversion
##### Evolito’s motor controls (MCUs), have been designed for seamless integration with our axial flux electric motors.

items.notes: Motor Controller Units (MCUs/inverters) designed for integration with their axial flux motors

evidence.snippet:
### Battery management
##### Evolito’s battery solutions have been designed to allow for rapid development of an Expandable Energy Storage System.

items.notes: Battery solutions and battery management systems; product page failed to mirror

Our holistic approach enables considered trade-offs between each component to achieve the most efficient, redundant and cost-effective solution for all aircraft architectures: eVTOLS, UAM, UAV, helicopters or General Aviation applications.
Thanks to our experience supplying the series production automotive market, we know that power density, quality and scalability are critical to the success of original equipment manufacturers (OEMs).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Supplies individual electric motors, MCUs, and battery management systems to OEMs (Vertical Aerospace, Electra, Flying Whales); does not manufacture complete aircraft

evidence.snippet: > “It’s great to see our D1500 motors, powering Cranfield’s hydrogen electric aircraft. The Fresson project is the 1st application showcasing our high redundancy 2×3 phase direct drive electric motor, providing industry leading torque & efficiency to the aircraft.

items.notes: Specific model; 2×3 phase direct drive; used in Cranfield Aerospace Project Fresson hydrogen aircraft

tagline: UK-based axial flux electric motor and controller supplier for eVTOL and hybrid-electric aircraft, in production with D1500 direct-drive motors and integrated MCUs. Selected by Vertical Aerospace (Valo), Electra (EL9), and Flying Whales; collaborating with Airbus on electric taxi systems. AS9100 certified. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown; public evidence on US supply-chain eligibility and specific program roadmap is sparse.
